outputs.trace_matrix:
row_id,module_ref,packet_ref,evidence_authority,trace_link,consumer_ceiling
T-001,page_module_A,approved_source_packet_ref,source_confirmed,source-to-module requirement trace,harness may treat as source-bounded candidate only
T-002,page_module_B,layout_or_materials_packet_ref,review_required,derived or incomplete support requiring human review,harness must not elevate beyond review_required
T-003,page_module_C,missing_packet_ref,missing,no approved supporting evidence available,harness blocked from source-supported claim
outputs.evidence_authority_map: source_confirmed means an approved source packet supports the row within the synthetic scenario. derived means downstream reasoning may exist but cannot replace source authority. review_required means the row needs review before stronger claims. missing means no approved evidence is available. Harness claim status must remain separate from these authority states.
outputs.trace_gap_register: G-001: page_module_B has review_required authority; blocker is unresolved review of packet support. G-002: page_module_C has missing authority; blocker is absent approved evidence. G-003: harness delta cannot raise any row above its evidence authority ceiling.
outputs.harness_trace_delta: Harness consumers receive row-level ceilings and blockers only. T-001 may be consumed as source-bounded input but not as completed verification. T-002 remains review_required. T-003 remains blocked. No harness delta may convert review_required or missing into source_confirmed.
outputs.verification_seed_matrix: Seed V-001 from T-001: verify source-to-module trace consistency. Seed V-002 from T-002: verify whether review can resolve authority. Seed V-003 from T-003: verify whether approved evidence exists before any downstream claim.
outputs.review_gate_evidence_index: Index R-001: T-001, source_confirmed, review may inspect trace completeness. Index R-002: T-002, review_required, review decision needed. Index R-003: T-003, missing, evidence acquisition or explicit gap acceptance needed.
outputs.trace_provenance: Synthetic public-safe workflow contract only. Scenario facts establish one source-supported row, one review-required row, one missing-evidence row, and one harness delta constrained below source authority.
outputs.boundary_review_note: This calibration output does not claim file edits, tool execution, runtime paths, hidden references, private evidence, upstream mutation, completed verification, or review approval.

provenance: Public-safe synthetic Page Module Trace Matrix v0 workflow contract
Synthetic scenario facts and boundary policy supplied in the prompt
gaps: No real packet contents are available or claimed; all rows are synthetic calibration rows.
Review-required and missing-evidence rows cannot be promoted to source_confirmed within this contract.
downstream_handoff: Harness receives claim-strength ceilings plus blockers, not automatic source-supported verdicts.
Verification and review receive seed/index rows, not completed verification evidence or review decisions.
boundary_review_note: No upstream artifacts are mutated or treated as replaced.
Public canon scope is limited to portable orchestration rules, state semantics, and sanitized templates.
no_claims: No tool use, file edits, runtime paths, hidden refs, or private/raw evidence are claimed.
No authority stronger than the synthetic contract is promoted.
